title: notogrammitis gunnii
intro: Notogrammitis gunnii, also known as the Tasmanian button fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the island of Tasmania in Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Notogrammitis gunnii include its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its ability to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Notogrammitis gunnii can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
